title: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami, US Marshals Service tells AP
summary: British prosecutors announced Saturday that they were seeking the brothers’ extradition on charges alleging they raped and trafficked women between 2010 and 2017.

title: Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami, US Marshals Service tells AP
summary: Influencer brothers Andrew and Tristan Tate, whose social media empire promoting wealth, male dominance and misogyny has made them among the world’s most polarizing internet personalities, were arrested Saturday in Miami as British authorities sought their extradition on rape and sex trafficking charges. The brothers were taken into custody by the U.S. Marshals Service on [...]
